primary_persona.name: Sarah Chen
pain_points: Launch planning is fragmented across docs and tools
Small team cannot afford long GTM prep cycles
goals: Ship product launches in under two weeks
Increase confidence in positioning before release
primary_persona.message_hook: Go from launch idea to execution-ready plan in one guided workflow.
primary_persona.willingness_to_pay: High if measurable speed and conversion gains are clear

secondary_personas.name: Marcus Rivera
pain_points: Needs both speed and quality under tight deadlines
Manual competitor and persona research slows launch cycles
goals: Deliver consistent launch narratives across channels
Cut planning overhead while improving campaign outcomes
secondary_personas.message_hook: Create launch strategy and campaign copy without sacrificing quality.
secondary_personas.willingness_to_pay: Medium to high for workflow automation that improves output quality

icp_summary: Early-stage to growth-stage SaaS teams with lean GTM functions and frequent launch cadence

messaging_framework.awareness: Launch prep is too slow and disconnected
messaging_framework.consideration: LaunchIQ unifies research, personas, strategy, and content
messaging_framework.decision: HITL checkpoints and measurable speed gains reduce launch risk
